sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23448" key="dapa/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰπᾰ´ν-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n23448.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consuming, devouring,</tr_> Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">146</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
